stories.title: 30-day re-run script with heuristic dashboard generation
stories.description: Enhance run_channel_30d_single.py to generate heuristic dashboard via render_heuristic_dashboard() after analysis, and add a CLI subcommand analyze-channel-30d for convenience
acceptanceCriteria: run_channel_30d_single.py calls render_heuristic_dashboard(rows, output_dir) after analysis
CLI has analyze-channel-30d subcommand that runs heuristic pipeline for a configured channel slug
Dashboard markdown file is generated in the output directory
Tests verify dashboard generation from heuristic rows end-to-end
All existing tests still pass

stories.title: Discord webhook notification support
stories.description: Add send_discord_message() to notifications.py with webhook URL support, add discord fields to NotificationConfig and AppConfig
acceptanceCriteria: send_discord_message(config, text) sends via Discord webhook URL
NotificationConfig has discord_webhook_url field
AppConfig loads discord_webhook_url from TOML and env var DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL
Returns False when credentials missing, True on success, False on error
Tests cover success, missing credentials, and error cases

stories.title: Unified notification dispatch in scheduler and pipeline
stories.description: Create notify_all() that sends to both Telegram and Discord, integrate into scheduler.py and the 30d pipeline completion
acceptanceCriteria: notify_all(config, text) dispatches to both Telegram and Discord
scheduler.py uses notify_all() instead of direct send_telegram_message()
run_channel_30d_single.py sends notification on completion with summary
Tests verify notify_all dispatches to both channels
All existing scheduler tests still pass

stories.title: LLM-based expert claim extraction
stories.description: Add LLM-powered claim extraction path in expert_interview.py that produces richer structured claims with reasoning and confidence, falling back to heuristic when LLM unavailable
acceptanceCriteria: extract_expert_insights_llm() uses LLM provider to extract structured claims
Each claim includes claim text, reasoning, confidence, and direction (bullish/bearish/neutral)
ExpertInsight model gains structured_claims field for LLM-extracted claims
Graceful fallback to heuristic _extract_key_claims() when LLM fails or is unavailable
Pipeline integrates LLM claim extraction for EXPERT_INTERVIEW videos when provider != mock
Tests verify LLM extraction, fallback behavior, and integration
